findings: Polling-only result verification: Lines 152-159 poll for result file every 5s for up to 90s, but never verify agent process is alive during wait period
No agent heartbeat simulation: Mock agent (lines 24-59) completes task instantly without simulating any pulse/heartbeat behavior that real agents would emit
No PID tracking verification: Test launches stampede.sh which creates PID files, but never verifies PIDs were written or processes are running
No tmux pane spawn verification: Lines 71, 113 launch agents with --no-attach but don't verify tmux panes actually created or agents attached
Silent agent failure gap: If agent crashes between line 71 and line 154, test would timeout with generic 'no result after 90s' message without detecting agent death
No stuck agent detection coverage: Test doesn't exercise or validate stampede-monitor.sh stuck detection capabilities
Metaswarm child telemetry validation incomplete: Lines 114-148 validate fleet.json structure and child-agents.jsonl existence, but don't verify real-time pulse entries or progress updates
Commander progress tracking not exercised: Metaswarm test uses --agent-cmd true (line 113) which bypasses actual commander agent execution and nested progress tracking
